title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Over-ear headphones with Bluetooth 5.3, up to 30 hours of battery, and a foldable design for travel.

title: Smart Fitness Watch
description: Tracks heart rate, sleep, and workouts on a bright always-on display. Water resistant to 50m.

title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Pocket-sized speaker with 360-degree sound, an IPX7 waterproof shell, and 12 hours of playback.

title: 1080p HD Action Camera
description: Compact action camera with image stabilisation, a waterproof case, and mounts for any rig.

title: Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and a USB-C charging case.

title: USB-C Fast Charger
description: 65W GaN charger that powers phones and laptops, with two USB-C ports and one USB-A.

title: Wireless Keyboard & Mouse Combo
description: Low-profile keyboard and silent mouse on a single USB receiver, with months of battery life.

title: 27-inch 4K LED Monitor
description: 27-inch 4K display with slim bezels, 99% sRGB colour, and both HDMI and USB-C inputs.
